description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6.10.3 Docker image. Define three stages: ver, init, and tests. In the ver stage add a version job that runs node --version and whoami. In the init stage add an init job that runs npm cache clean, rm -rf node-modules, npm install -g mocha, npm install -g istanbul, and npm install. In the tests stage add a run_tests job that runs npm install -g mocha, npm install -g istanbul, npm install, and npm test.
